appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the Bun 1.3.10 workspace-script syntax requirement in `.factory/library/environment.md` so future workers use `bun run --cwd <path> <script>` instead of the legacy ordering.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update worker skills that still prescribe `bun --cwd <path> run test` to use Bun 1.3.10-compatible syntax (`bun run --cwd <path> test`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed perf-guardrails features reported handoff deviations because the documented command printed Bun usage, and the same outdated syntax remains in `.factory/skills/perf-guardrails-worker/SKILL.md`, `.factory/skills/web-perf-worker/SKILL.md`, and `.factory/skills/desktop-perf-worker/SKILL.md`.

rejectedObservations.observation: `.factory/services.yaml` needs a Bun command syntax update.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented-or-already-fixed: the current manifest already uses `bun run --cwd ...`, so the reviewed handoff note was stale by the time of scrutiny synthesis.

rejectedObservations.observation: Workers need guidance to invoke `.factory/init.sh` via `bash` because the file is not executable.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the current repository copy of `.factory/init.sh` is executable, so this appears to have been an environment-specific transient rather than a stable shared-state rule.
